hooks.command: $data = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($data.tool_input.file_path -match 'Application.*(Dto|Response|Request|Command|Query).*\.cs$') { '{"systemMessage":"Backend DTO/Command/Query zmenene — over ci frontend/wedding-app/types/api.ts je synchronizovany"}' }

$data = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $data.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'git push.*(--force|\s-f(\s|$))') { '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Force push je zablokovany — pouzij feature branch a PR."}' }
